seo.title: Image Palette Extractor | Creative Lab
seo.description: Extract dominant colors from an image directly in your browser.

product.title: Palette Extractor
product.description: Upload an image, detect its dominant colors and export the palette as HEX, CSS or JSON.

extractor.title: Select an image
extractor.intro: The image is analyzed locally in your browser.
extractor.uploadTitle: Drag an image here or click to select it
extractor.uploadHelp: JPG, PNG, WebP or SVG. Maximum 20 MB.
extractor.paletteDescription: Click a color to copy it.

info.title: How to extract a palette with Creative Lab
info.description: Select an image, choose how many colors you need and export the palette.

picker.title: Exact color at a point
picker.description: Click or tap anywhere on the image to read the exact color of that pixel.
picker.noSelection: No point has been selected yet.
